description: Mid-brown clayey silt with occasional small sub-rounded gravel. Occasional charcoal fragments. Firm compaction. Finds throughout.
interpretation: Secondary fill of ditch [102]. Accumulated through natural silting and dumping.

finds.notes: Greyware sherds (10), Samian ware base sherd (1), oxidised ware (1)

samples.notes: For flotation — 40L from primary fill deposit
